div.head: The Ambassador in Great Britain (Dawes) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 293. From Caldwell: Conference closed without reaching agreement on quotas.See League of Nations, Traffic in Opium and Other Dangerous Drugs; Conference on the Limitation of the Manufacture of Dangerous Drugs: Report of the Preliminary Meeting of Official Representatives of the Manufacturing Countries, Held in London, October–November 1930 (C.669.M.278.1930.XI). Discussion will be continued in Advisory Committee in January and in the meantime representatives of British, Swiss, German and French Governments are to have further conversations among themselves.
I am sailing on the Leviathan on the 18th. [Caldwell.]
